Package index

All functions

.dr_download()
Download and process DATRAS data to parquet files
.dr_row_classifier()
Row-Wise Value Classifier
dr_add_date()
Calculate date based on Year, Month, and Day.
dr_add_id()
Generate a unique haul id
dr_add_length_cm()
Add a standardized length_cm column to the input table
dr_add_length_mm()
Add a standardized length_mm column to the input table
dr_add_n_and_cpue()
Numbers caught and the CPUE in each length class
dr_add_record_type()
Classify HL records by measurement type
dr_add_starttime()
Calculate timestamp based on Year, Month, Day, and StartTime/TimeShot.
dr_coastline
A valid aphia id - latin name lookup
dr_coltypes
Datras variable types
dr_con()
Establish a DuckDB Connection to DATRAS Datasets
dr_con_by_haul()
Get numbers and weights summary of species by haul
dr_download()
Download DATRAS parquet files
dr_get()
Download and Import DATRAS Data
dr_get_fields()
Get DATRAS Field Specifications
dr_latin_aphia
Coastline covering majority of DATRAS data
dr_settypes()
Set variable types
dr_translate()
Translate column names of a data.frame or lazy tibble using a dictionary
getIndicesAllYears()
Get Survey Indices for All Years
getIndicesAllYears2()
Get Survey Indices for All Years
get_datras_unaggregated_data()
Download unaggregated DATRAS survey data

Lookup table for HL record types
